name_cn:
SAUMUR BB Handbag #️⃣M46740
Exclusive global launch! This item is crafted with the same Italian custom as the authentic boutique version, featuring dynamic chip code changing, original factory exclusive materials, and original factory electroplated all-steel hardware (color matches the authentic).
Please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + the latest official website gift box!
20 x 16 x 7.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram Coated Canvas
Calfskin Trim
Microfiber Lining
Hardware
Calfskin buckle and magnetic closure
Side buckle
Back patch pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 44.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 51.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, removable
Made in Italy
